summary: This document appears to be a technical API documentation or software interface specification for a 'DatasetsMut' module showing the 'CreateDatasetFromSnapshotResult' function. It contains only software programming interface details with field definitions (isSuccess: Boolean, message: String) and implementation references for various error handling cases.

content_blocks.title: CreateDatasetFromSnapshotResult
content_blocks.content: API documentation showing a data structure with two fields: isSuccess (Boolean type) and message (String type). Lists implementation classes including CreateDatasetResultInvalidSnapshot, CreateDatasetResultMissingInputs, CreateDatasetResultNameCollision, CreateDatasetResultSuccess, MetadataManifestMalformed, and MetadataManifestUnsupportedVersion.

key_findings: This is software/API documentation, not a biotech research document
Contains no experimental data, biological research content, or TRL-relevant information
Document shows programming interface specifications only
